tools.name: compare_travel_illustrative_prices
tools.description: Use ONLY for travel insurance requests. Use this when the user wants a high-level comparison of illustrative travel insurance sample prices available through boleron.bg. Return only non-binding sample daily prices per person and headline coverage cues for comparison. Do not present the result as a quote, offer, premium, eligibility decision, or trip-specific calculation. Always clarify that the final premium depends on full trip details, traveler data, insurer rules, and the information entered on boleron.bg.

tools.name: explain_travel_coverage
tools.description: Retrieve the most relevant approved travel insurance policy text chunks for a selected insurer based on the user's question. Use this tool when the user asks whether something is covered, excluded, limited, or subject to conditions under an insurer's travel insurance product. This tool does not produce the final answer. It returns source text chunks from the insurer's approved product documents so the LLM can interpret them and answer the user grounded in those excerpts.
